summary: Verified MapPage.js hook integration refactoring (useMapState, useFriendsOnMap). All 5 features tested and passing: Map renders without errors, map tiles load properly (no black map), filter tabs work, surf spot markers appear, zoom controls work. No NaN/LatLng errors detected.
critical_code_review_comments: useMapState hook correctly manages UI state (selectedSpot, filter, drawers, modals, pulsingMarkers)
useFriendsOnMap hook correctly manages friends display with 30s polling interval
MapPage.js properly imports and uses both hooks at lines 55-56
ESLint warnings for missing dependencies in useCallback/useEffect are non-critical (intentional to prevent infinite loops)
context_for_next_testing_agent: MapPage.js hook integration is complete and working. useMapState manages UI state, useFriendsOnMap manages friends display. The hooks useOnDemandRequests and useRequestPro were intentionally NOT integrated because they use wrong API endpoints (/on-demand/ instead of /dispatch/). L_DISABLE_3D=true in index.html prevents Samsung Black Map bug - DO NOT change this.

map_page_renders_without_errors.details: Leaflet map container found, page loads successfully after login

map_tiles_load_properly.details: 40 map tiles loaded, dark theme visible, no black map issue

filter_tabs_work.details: All, Surf Spots, Photographers tabs found and clickable

surf_spots_appear_as_markers.details: 27 Leaflet markers + 26 cluster markers visible with spot counts (97, 390, 156, etc.)

map_zoom_controls_work.details: Zoom in/out buttons found and clicked successfully

no_nan_latlng_errors.details: No Invalid LatLng or NaN errors detected in console

eslint_warnings.note: These are intentional to prevent infinite re-render loops in useCallback/useEffect
